chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.S-265 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 22.08.2025 Mr. Rashid Ali Tunio, Advocate a/w Petitioners No.1 & 2. Private respondents No.6 & 7 are present in person. Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w Inspector Ghulam Mustafa Meerani, S.H.O. P.S. Nasirabad. ------ Pursuant to Court’s notice, father of petitioner No.1 namely Shakeel Ahmed, mother Yasmeen and brother Masoom Ahmed are present in the Court; they have met with petitioner No.1 and submit that they have no objection to the marriage of the petitioners, but they need security for the future of petitioner No.1. Petitioner No.2, present in the Court, undertakes that he will treat petitioner No.1 cordially and shall not cause any maltreatment to her and will allow the parents to meet with her as and when they desire. The S.H.O. P.S. Nasirabad is present and filed statement that he shall provide protection to the petitioners as and when required. In view of above, this petition stands disposed of with directions to the official respondents to ensure protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. Judge Manzoor
